name: HackQuest
fullText:
24 hours to go 🚨

We’re about to see top ideas from our Bittensor Subnet Ideathon come to life on testnet.

Round 2 is where concepts become real, working @opentensor subnets — live & ready to prove themselves.

Final push. Let’s see what you’ve built 👇
